Offers outpatient services with an option for telehealth. 631 N 1st Avenue Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (971) 772-4309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA PLAZA HEALTH CENTER CASCADIA CENTRAL INTAKE AND REFERRAL LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an intake line for services such as case management, individual, family, group, geriatric and LGBTQ counseling, alcohol and drug treatment services, DUII and gambling addiction/treatment services, recovery housing services, sexual abuse counseling, domestic violence services, urgent mental health services, medication management, money management, outreach, crisis intervention, outpatient mental health services, and early intervention services. Provides about 1000 units in sites operating as licensed residential, permanent supported housing, and independent housing. 4212 SE Division Street Suites 100 and 200 Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 674-7777 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA TALBERT HEALTH CENTER HEALTH CENTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health counseling for individuals and families, individual and group, as well as gambling addiction counseling, primary care, and substance use disorder (SUD) services, including Adult Outpatient/Recovery day services and supportive employment. 12360 SE Sunnyside Road Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am-2pm Intake Phone Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 303-4000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH COLUMBIA COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH CREEKSIDE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services, including counseling for adults and children, psychological assessments, rehabilitation case management, residential services, psychiatric services, and outreach to outlying areas. Provides addictions/dependency treatment for youth and adults for alcohol, drugs, and gambling. Services include assessment, intensive outpatient, day treatment, referral for residential treatment, and dual diagnosis services. 58646 McNulty Way Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 397-5211 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONTINUUM BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & RECOVERY SERVICES CAVE JUNCTION OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive outpatient treatment for substance use, mental health, and co-occurring conditions. Also provides gambling disorder counseling, partial hospitalization, and day treatment. 219 S Redwood Hwy Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Outpatient: Unrestricted Partial hospitalization or day treatment: Individuals with severe mental illness and substance use disorders Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 592-5350 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONTINUUM BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & RECOVERY SERVICES GRANTS PASS OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive outpatient treatment for substance use, mental health, and co-occurring conditions. Also provides gambling disorder counseling, partial hospitalization, and day treatment. 690 Rouge River Highway Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Outpatient: Unrestricted Partial hospitalization or day treatment: Individuals with severe mental illness and substance use disorders Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 955-9227 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONTINUUM BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & RECOVERY SERVICES MEDFORD OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive outpatient treatment for substance use, mental health, and co-occurring conditions. Also provides gambling disorder counseling, partial hospitalization, and day treatment. 300 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Outpatient: Unrestricted Partial hospitalization or day treatment: Individuals with severe mental illness and substance use disorders Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 772-1777 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EMERGENCE EMERGENCE ODYSSEY MERIDIAN GAMBLING TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides problem gambling education and treatment, support groups, outpatient care (group and individual), referral services, concerned others/family support and education, and intervention. Individual counseling is available. Also offers aftercare, pretreatment, relapse prevention and support, and substance abuse treatment for those clients who may be co-addicted. Referrals are provided as needed. 2149 Centennial Plaza Suite 4 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing compulsive gambling and affected family members or partners Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Email (541) 741-7107 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEWIS AND CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER LEWIS & CLARK PROBLEM GAMBLING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment to individuals, couples, and families for problem gambling issues. All services are confidential. Supports social equity by providing easily accessible and culturally sensitive treatment. 4445 SW Barbur Boulevard Suites 107, 205 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Any person experiencing problem or compulsive gambling that is an Oregon resident or does most of their gambling in the state of Oregon. Family members, partners, friends, and coworkers of problem gamblers are eligible for services. Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clinic: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 9am-8pm, Saturday-Sunday 9am-4pm Email (503) 768-6325 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWAYS INC PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides inpatient and outpatient substance use disorder treatment services, including assessment and individual and group treatment/education. If needed, services are coordinated with the local court system, SAFE Court, and Community Corrections to fulfill legal obligations. Other services include domestic violence intervention services, moral reconation groups, anger management, dual diagnosis treatment, and urinalysis and other screening tools. Substance use disorder prevention education available for children, parents, and community members. Also provides gambling assessment and treatment. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Assessment walk-in hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Office: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm, evening services available Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINN COUNTY ALCOHOL AND DRUG PREVENTION TREATMENT OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prevention and treatment services for alcohol, drug, and gambling addiction. Treatment services include substance use disorder assessment and counseling, juvenile drug court treatment, gambling counseling, and referrals to residential treatment and other resources. Prevention services include education in schools and the community. 104 4th Avenue SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm. Evening treatment groups available Monday-Thursday. Other evening appointments by arrangement. Email (541) 967-3819 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINN COUNTY ALCOHOL AND DRUG PREVENTION TREATMENT LINN COUNTY ALCOHOL AND DRUG PREVENTION TREATMENT LEBANON OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prevention and treatment services for alcohol, drug, and gambling addiction. Email (541) 451-5932 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINN COUNTY ALCOHOL AND DRUG PREVENTION TREATMENT LINN COUNTY ALCOHOL AND DRUG PREVENTION TREATMENT SWEET HOME OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prevention and treatment services for alcohol, drug, and gambling addiction. Treatment services include substance use disorder assessment and counseling, juvenile drug court treatment, gambling counseling, and referrals to residential treatment and other resources. Prevention services include education in schools and the community. 799 Long Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 367-3888 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MEDICINE WHEEL RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient services including alcohol and drug treatment, co-occurring disorder care, DUI programming, gambling treatment, mental health counseling, and cultural activities, with cultural and spiritual wellness guiding all service planning. Services include assessments, individual and group therapy, and crisis and safety planning, with referrals to community partners for medication management or specialized mental health needs. Works with community agencies to support participants involved in courts and social service systems, helping with re-entry and reducing barriers related to housing, employment, education, stigma, and rebuilding trust. Offers recidivism risk assessments, Rent Well classes, life-skills and employment readiness groups, parenting support, resource navigation, and volunteer opportunities. 58147 Columbia River Highway Suite C Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Provides culturally specific services for the Native American community. Some services are gender-specific, while other services are co-ed. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm DUII treatment: Monday-Friday 2pm-5pm Email (503) 396-5322 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW OUTPATIENT TREATMENT CENTER OUTPATIENT ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental assessments and evaluation, substance abuce counseling, parenting groups, gambling addiction treatment, DUI rehiabiliation programs, and traditional ceremonies. 1631 SW Columbia Street Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Provides culturally appropriate services for the Native American community. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 307-7775 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU AVEL GORDLY CENTER FOR HEALING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally responsive mental health services, including African American–focused services. Offers individual, group, couples, and family counseling, as well as medication support. Helps adults, couples, and families address concerns such as depression, anxiety, trauma, major life changes, substance use, DUI treatment, problem gambling, and ongoing health conditions. Works to reduce stigma around mental health and encourage healing. 621 SW Alder Street Suite 520 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Sliding scale fees for mental health services are available to uninsured Multnomah County residents who identify as African or African American and have incomes at or below 200% of the federal poverty level. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-6pm, Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 418-5311 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC BRYSON CENTER ADULT THERAPY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessments, psychiatric treatment, group and individual therapy, gambling and substance use disorder treatment from counselors, social workers, and clinical psychologists. Offers case management, supportive employment services, peer support, and adult skills training for daily living with a focus on budgeting, meal prep, and using public transit. Also provides information and referrals to community resources. 200 Beatty Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC HILLSIDE CENTER ADULT THERAPY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessments, psychiatric treatment, group and individual therapy, gambling and substance use disorder treatment from counselors, social workers, and clinical psychologists. Also provides information and referrals to community resources. 1545 Harbeck Road Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC ILLINOIS VALLEY CENTER ADULT THERAPY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessments, psychiatric treatment, group and individual therapy, gambling and substance use disorder treatment from counselors, social workers, and clinical psychologists. Offers case management, supportive employment services, peer support, and adult skills training for daily living with a focus on budgeting, meal prep, and using public transit. Also provides information and referrals to community resources. 319 Caves Highway Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTBACK STRONG ADULT SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER AND ADDICTIONS TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the following substance use disorder services: -Outpatient treatment and education for adolescents and adults -Individual, family, and group counseling options -DUII Diversion Treatment including DMV Certification -Substance abuse assessments and assist with referrals to inpatient treatment facilities if deemed necessary -Comprehensive prevention program -Anger management courses -Services related to gambling difficulties 215 N G Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 947-6021 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTBACK STRONG CHRISTMAS VALLEY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER AND ADDICTIONS TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the following substance use disorder services: -Outpatient treatment and education for adolescents and adults -Individual, family, and group counseling options -DUII Diversion Treatment including DMV Certification -Substance abuse assessments and assist with referrals to inpatient treatment facilities if deemed necessary -Comprehensive prevention program -Anger management courses -Services related to gambling difficulties 87520 Bay Road Christmas Valley, OR 97641 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 947-6021 4 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SAFE JOURNEYS LLC TREATMENT AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides state-certified outpatient treatment for DUII and Substance Use Disorders (SUD), including relapse prevention and addictions counseling (problem gambling included). Also offers support for parenting skills, trauma, stress, anger management, life skills, and wellness coaching. Telehealth services available via audio or video conferencing. 18801 SW Martinazzi Avenue Suite 206 Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Age 21 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm by appointment only Email (503) 989-0991 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SYMMETRY CARE INC MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This program provides outpatient mental health services, evaluation and outpatient treatment for substance abuse, referral to residential treatment programs, follow-up for individuals coming out of residential treatment, outpatient treatment program for problem gamblers, and education and outreach to the community. 348 W Adams Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 573-8376 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services related to alcohol, drug, and gambling addiction.
